reasoning: The 2025 National Heads-Up Poker Championship was pre-recorded and took place from August 1-3, 2025. While the official airing on Peacock is scheduled for late 2025 (Fall 2025), reports from mid-October 2025 indicate that the outcome has leaked via prediction markets. Multiple sources report that Sam Soverel is the winner of the event, with market probabilities for him exceeding 90-95% following the suspected leak. Ryan Feldman was confirmed as a participant in the 64-player field (matched against Sean Winter in the first round), but there is no evidence suggesting he won the tournament. Given the strong evidence pointing to a different winner, the probability of Ryan Feldman winning is extremely low.
